docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SABEL NORMAN AS TO DEFENDANT HILL STACEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HILL STACEY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-04-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO FEB-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HILL STACEY
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTY'S FILED. ASSIGNED TO PILLSBURY, MADISON & SUTRO, 225 BUSH ST. P.O. BX 7880, S.F. CA.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABEL NORMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL STACEY $4,620.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,620.00, PLTF SHALL NOTIFY DEFT & PERMIT HIM TO RECOVER PER SONAL PROPERTY REMOVED FROM DEFT'S APT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABEL NORMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL STACEY $4,620.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,620.00, SEE FILE. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23187 ON 6-22-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABEL NORMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HILL STACEY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23187, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
